parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: Control if this node is querying data from the OpenVR driver.

parameters.name: output
parameters.label: Output
parameters.description: Controls what kind of category of data will be output from this node.

parameters.name: maxtrackers
parameters.label: Max Trackers
parameters.description: The maximum number of trackers whose data should be output from this node.

parameters.name: firsttracker
parameters.label: First Tracker
parameters.description: The first tracker number to be output. For example if this is set to 2 and Max Trackers is 2, then data for trackers 2 and 3 will be output.

parameters.name: orientation
parameters.label: Orientation
parameters.description: When doing 'Sensor' output, controls if the orientation channels will be output. By default the units for orientation are 1 unit = 1 meter.

parameters.name: generalinfo
parameters.label: General Info
parameters.description: When doing 'Sensor' output, controls of general information channels will be output, such as render resolution and play area size.

parameters.name: near
parameters.label: Near
parameters.description: When outputting 'Projection Matrices', controls the near plane the projection matrix will be built with.

parameters.name: far
parameters.label: Far
parameters.description: When outputting 'Projection Matrices', controls the far plane the projection matrix will be built with.

parameters.name: unitscale
parameters.label: Unit Scale
parameters.description: OpenVR by default works in a scale where 1 unit = 1 meter. This parameter allows the scale to be changed incase a scene is imported with a different scale.

parameters.name: customactions
parameters.label: Custom Actions
parameters.description: Turn on to allow specifying a custom manifest file.

parameters.name: actionmanifest
parameters.label: Action Manifest
parameters.description: A path to a manifest file. By default this is using the same manifest OpenVR uses when Custom Actions is disabled.

parameters.name: uselegacynames
parameters.label: Use Legacy Names
parameters.description: Use legacy channel naming convention coming from the Action Manifest. This should stay off unless loading existing old files.

parameters.name: skeletonrange
parameters.label: Skeleton Range
parameters.description: Controls the range of motion of the skeleton values.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page.

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).

parameters.name: recenter
parameters.label: Recenter
parameters.description: Help Not Available.
